command.generateCommit.title: Generate Commit Message
command.stopGeneration.title: Stop Generation
command.selectAvailableModel.title: Select Available Model
command.showTokenStats.title: Show Token Usage Statistics
command.resetTokenStats.title: Reset Token Usage Statistics
configuration.service.apiKey.description: API key for authentication with your AI service provider.
configuration.service.baseURL.descriptio: Base URL of the AI service API endpoint.
configuration.service.model.description: AI model to use for generating commit messages. Run [Commit Message Generator: Select Available Model](command:commit-message-generator.selectAvailableModel) to choose from available options.
configuration.format.outputLanguage.desc: Language for all AI-generated content (commit messages).
configuration.commit.autoStage.descripti: Automatically stage all changes (git add .) before generating the commit message.
configuration.commit.enableEmojiPrefix.d: Add emoji prefix before commit type (e.g., ✨ feat, 🐛 fix).
configuration.commit.customPrompt.descri: Custom prompt to append to the commit message generation system message. Examples: enforce Jira ticket numbers, use specific format, follow team conventions.
